name: stupid-ai
description: stupid-ai — a marketplace for Human-Plan-driven Claude Code workflows. We trust LLMs less than we trust a written plan a human can read.

plugins.name: human-plan-flow
plugins.description: A Human-Plan-driven development workflow: idea → design → design-check → plan-check → worktree → dev → bug-fix → audit, plus arch-check / code-scan / batch-code-scan for continuous codebase health.
